review_text: The SleepPro mattress is... okay. It's not bad, not great. I sleep on it every night so I guess it works. Delivery was fast, which I appreciated. The edge support is a bit soft — I roll towards the side sometimes. Not sure I'd recommend it to others, but I'm not replacing it either.

scoring_notes.notes: buy_again MUST be null — reviewer is ambiguous, not explicitly saying no
